title: pyrus rehderi
intro: Pyrus rehderi, also known as the Rehder's pear or the Chinese mountain pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The bark, leaves, and fruit of the Pyrus rehderi plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pyrus rehderi include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for use in medicine, although its preparations and uses may vary depending on the region and cultural context.
